title: Drogheda, Louth — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Drogheda, Louth: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Drogheda is a city in Louth with a population of 44,000. A historic town on the Boyne River, known for the nearby UNESCO-listed Brú na Bóinne megalithic tombs, medieval St. Laurence’s Gate, and a growing commuter population.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
